title: atriplex hortensis var. microtheca
intro: Atriplex hortensis var. microtheca, also known as the small leaf orache or microtheca orache, is a variety of the orach plant, a type of succulent that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Atriplex hortensis var. microtheca include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Atriplex hortensis var. microtheca can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
